## HOURS TO AVOID (from 379 trades)
- 04:00 UTC — Asian session, low volume, fakeouts
- 06:00 UTC — Session transition, random moves
- 19:00 UTC — End of NY session, exhaustion moves

## HOURS TO TRADE
- 09:00 UTC — London open, volume picks up
- 14:00 UTC — London/NY overlap, highest volume
- 20:00 UTC — NY close, volume spike confirms breakouts
- 21:00 UTC — Best hour (26/122 combos peak here)

## RULES
1. Never trade conf < 3. All 15 worst losers were conf=3.
2. Only 1 bot process. 4 bots = rate limit death.
3. Trail to breakeven at +0.3%. Activate trail at +1.0%.
4. 3% risk per trade max. Increase only after $10k equity.
5. Short only with strong DOWN trend + confluence.
6. ETH: leave alone. Never touch (-$928 lifetime).
7. Check ADX before breakout trades. ADX < 20 = ranging, skip.
8. Volume must confirm. Min 1.3x avg for 5m, 1.5x for 1H.
9. Compound daily. Recalculate position size from equity.
10. If drawdown > 20%, reduce to 1% risk. If > 30%, stop and review.

## LESSONS FROM BACKTEST (869,199 trades)
- Breakouts win. Everything else loses.
- Tight trails (0.3-2%) kill profits. Use 10-20% on breakouts.
- No trail = more profit but higher variance.
- 5m TFs work best with loose trail (20%).
- 1H TFs work with medium trail (10%).
- Fib_ext on 15m needs ATR-based trail (x3).
- Higher risk (3-14.5%) is mathematically safe per Kelly.
- $3k with 3% risk and daily compound = $170k in 12 months.
